creator: rannumgen@globaleyes.net
text:
Removed old "/var/db/ports/ruby" directory, installed ruby19, removed
"ports-mgmt/portupgrade-devel", installed "ports-mgmt/portupgrade" which
in turn installed "lang/ruby18" ("ruby+nopthread-1.8.7.160_4,1"). No
apparent problem with compile and install of "lang/ruby18".
"lang/ruby19" can probably be removed.

This PR may be closed with a resolution of removing old ruby18 package
and files along with "ports/ruby/options" file, and then reinstalling
lang/ruby18.
